Headline: #62 Archer, #62H Archer/Harlem and #55N 55th/Narragansett Temporary Reroute near Archer/Narragansett
ShortDescription: 62 Archer, 62H Archer/Harlem & 55N 55th/Narragansett buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Archer/Narragansett due to a street blockage.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#62 Archer, #62H Archer/Harlem & #55N 55th/Narragansett buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near Archer/Narragansett due to a street blockage.

#62 Archer buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Archer, Central, 63rd, Harlem, Archer (into terminal) and over normal route. 

#62H Archer/Harlem buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Archer, Central, 63rd, Harlem and over normal route. 

#55N 55th/Narragansett buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 55th, Austin, 63rd, Narragansett and over normal route. 

Allow extra travel time.
